_comment: WC2026 Group L. Standings before this match: England 3 pts (4-2 Croatia), Ghana 3 (1-0 Panama), Croatia 0, Panama 0. Top-of-group clash, both won MD1. England the clear quality side and attacking (scored 4 on Croatia) but leaked 2 -> not airtight at the back; Ghana organized, beat Panama 1-0, physical and can carry a threat (Kudus). Calibrated as a strong-favorite spot in line with the market; applying the Spain/Portugal lesson -> do NOT lean below an elite favourite. Referee/XIs not yet confirmed -> cards not modelled; recalibrate with confirmed lineups ~60 min before kickoff.

meta.stakes: Both on 3 points after MD1 wins (England 4-2 Croatia; Ghana 1-0 Panama). The winner takes control of Group L and is all but through. England the favourite on quality; Ghana a competitive, organized underdog.

home.name: England
notes: Elite attacking side (Bellingham, Saka, Kane, Foden); put 4 on Croatia. attack 1.55.
Conceded 2 to Croatia -> not airtight, Ghana can threaten. defense 0.95.
Calibrated in line with the market (~69%): don't lean below an elite favourite (Spain/Portugal lesson). rho -0.07.

away.name: Ghana
notes: Organized, physical African side; beat Panama 1-0. Kudus the main threat. attack 0.82.
Decent but not elite defense vs an England attack at this level. defense 1.02.
Competitive underdog; can nick a goal given England's leaky back line.
